span.p: Legacy AT verify outcome? (ok = passed on first run | red = test/DSL/driver wrong)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: STOP - HUMAN REVIEW — legacy AT verify RED; the test/DSL/driver is suspect (SUT is never modified in a legacy cycle). Edit the offending layer and re-run the legacy cycle from scratch.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Verify: run assembled legacy AT tests — inverted-RED, expected to PASS on first run
